Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Dietrich J, Sauer P, Baumstark L, Wirth S, Giannousakis A, Rodrigues R, Bodirsky B, Leip D, Crawford M, Kreidenweis U, Klein D, Rein P (2026). madrat: May All Data be Reproducible and Transparent (MADRaT). R package version 3.35.2.

On this page
